content.en:
The Ancestral Body is an evolved version of the Holy Body, and under normal circumstances, it is many times more difficult for the Invincible Domain Ancestor to master the Ancestral Body than it is to master the Ancestral Technique.

Only the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate have mastered the half-step Ancestral Body, and there is still some distance from the true Ancestral Body.

"I want to break the limit of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, relying on ordinary resources alone is useless, I can only rely on the characteristics of derivation!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Deriving the characteristics and deducing the eternal immortal holy body is more reliable than any resource.

Maybe the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor obtained a rare treasure, which broke the limit of the Holy Body, but he didn't have that kind of treasure, and he didn't know where it was.

He only has the property of derivation.

Of course, Ye Tian knew very well that even if he relied on the characteristics of derivation, if he wanted to break the limit of the Holy Body, he would probably need a long time, and he would need to copy the body countless times.

Fortunately, Ye Tian broke through to the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm, and the Holy Soul was many times stronger, so the Holy Soul was enough to support the deduction of the derivation characteristics for a long time, and the effect was much better than at the beginning.

"Copy the body!"

Ye Tian copied his body again, and then the copied body began to evolve, deducing the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

He deduced the Eternal Immortal Holy Body step by step to the Ancestral Body realm, before that, Ye Tian didn't have any clue, but with the help of the Derivation Characteristics, he continued to consume the Holy Soul Origin and deduce the Eternal Immortal Holy Body little by little.

After a long time, Ye Tian's Holy Soul Origin was exhausted, and the copy body died directly.

"About 1/10,000 of the progress!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

In other words, he needs to copy his body 10,000 times and deplete the Holy Soul Origin 10,000 times through the derivation characteristics before he can truly deduce the Ancestral Body and break the limit of the Holy Body.

What is this concept when the Holy Soul Origin is exhausted ten thousand times?

If someone else obtains the Derivation Characteristic, he will have a life, and if he dares to exhaust the Origin, even if he consumes a little Origin, it will take a long time to recover.

Therefore, even if others obtain the derived properties, it is not of much help.

It is only for Ye Tian that the derivation characteristics are extremely awesome.

The years passed, and in the blink of an eye, a billion years passed.

The human race has more than a dozen Saints, and after a billion years, these dozen Saints have naturally risen one after another.

And after many Terran Domain Ancestors cultivated to the peak realm of the strongest Domain Ancestors, they could exchange a grain of Star Soul Sand from the Temple at a very low price, thus giving birth to Soul Holy Light and impacting the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm.

Now, a billion years have passed, and hundreds of invincible domain ancestors have been born in the human race.

The main thing is that it is not easy to be able to cultivate to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and it is not easy to cultivate to the peak of the Supreme Domain Ancestor and grow the soul to a certain extent.

In addition, Ye Tian's qualifications for the exchange of Star Soul Sand are also relatively strict, and it is not something that can be given casually.

Therefore, only thousands of people have obtained the Star Soul Sand now, and some of the strongest domain ancestors of the human race want to give birth to the holy soul even if they give birth to the soul holy light, so they are not in a hurry to impact the invincible domain ancestor realm, otherwise the human race would have already given birth to thousands of invincible domain ancestors.

The biggest improvement is undoubtedly Ye Tian's family.

With the help of the Holy Blood Marrow, they reshaped their foundations one after another, and they also obtained Ye Tian's massive resource cultivation, and also gave birth to the Holy Fu, and practiced the Holy Technique one by one.

Moreover, they also have Star Soul Sand and Saint Sands, Ye Tian will not be stingy with these resources, and supply them all to his family.

Therefore, Xiao Yue and Ye Xingchen all condensed the Holy Soul, and all of them underwent a secondary qualitative change.

Now, they have broken through to the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm, and have practiced several holy skills, although their cultivation has not yet been promoted to the peak realm of the Invincible Domain Ancestor, but they have also reached the peak realm of the early stage of the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and it is not far from the middle realm of the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

And their combat power has also reached the level of the four-step Invincible Domain Ancestor, and they are not weak in the Dark Sacred Domain.

......

"Finally understood!"

When Ye Tian's copy body was about to exhaust the origin, he suddenly opened his eyes, and the depths of his eyes were full of joy.

At this time, he had fully comprehended the key mystery of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body breaking the shackles and impacting the ancestral body.

"Then break through!"

Ye Tian's body began to impact the ancestral realm.

Rumble!!!!

The Holy Body was cracked slightly, and after being cracked and reshaped again and again, and after countless evolutionary recombinations, billions of reorganizations, billions of reorganizations, the shackles were finally broken.

This is also a way for Ye Tian to put on a show, and it can only be applied to him, not to others.

Because everyone's body is different, he derives himself, so he can only use it for himself.

The shackles are broken, the limits of the Eucharist are broken.

Ye Tian's physical body evolved directly towards the ancestral body, but it still needed to take many steps to complete the complete evolution.

And now, Ye Tian has condensed a half-step ancestral body!

Countless energies poured into Ye Tian's body, strengthening the half-step ancestral body.

10,000 years!

Millions of years!

Ten million years!

This transformation has been carried out for 100 million years before the qualitative change is finally completed.

Ye Tian's half-step ancestral body can far surpass the half-step ancestral body of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, after all, Ye Tian's holy body is the first holy body of the Dark Sacred Domain, even if it is condensed into an ancestral body, it is also the first ancestral body of the Dark Sacred Domain, which is naturally extremely terrifying.

"The Five Thunder Domain Ancestor has condensed a half-step ancestral body, with the help of the effect of the treasure, he wants to completely condense into an ancestral body, I am afraid it will take a long time, but I am different, I rely on my own to break the limit, and even have a complete method of condensing the ancestral body. It will probably take hundreds of millions of years, and with some more resources, you can completely condense the ancestral body!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If he condensed the ancestral body and then controlled the power of the physical body, he didn't need to control many times, he only needed to control dozens of times the strength, and he was afraid that he would have the hope of defeating a peerless domain ancestor.

This is not a joke, but a fact.

After all, his current strength is far superior to the one-step invincible domain ancestor, and he can even defeat the five thunder domain ancestors in one move.

"Continue to retreat and cultivate, and condense into the ancestral body as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In this way, countless years passed slowly, and hundreds of millions of years passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

Ye Tian was out of the customs, and his Eternal Immortal Ancestor was finally condensed, and his aura was extremely terrifying, if it was all released, it would be enough to suppress the ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Standing in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, Ye Tian clearly felt that the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm was no longer able to increase himself.

He felt that he could blow up the Xuanxu Saint Realm with a single punch, and even shake the Dao Mountain Realm.

Of course, this is a delusion, but it is also enough to prove how terrifying your strength is.
